title: copier: Preserve file flags when copying archives on FreeBSD
body:
This approach should also work on darwin but I have only tested on FreeBSD.

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

Signed-off-by: Doug Rabson <dfr@rabson.org>

#### What type of PR is this?

/kind other

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

This preserves file flags on FreeBSD when copying archives, e.g. with 'buildah add'

#### How to verify it

Make a tar file containing flag changes and add it to a buildah container.

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

I haven't included tests here since I haven't ported the buildah integration tests yet

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```
